perf_hint: each pixel replays the hits still ringing on its one string, so frame time scales with hit density over `5 / damping` seconds — heavier damping is cheaper; on software rendering preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p

params.name: strings
params.description: How many strings span the frame.

params.name: tone
params.description: The course's visual pitch: how fast a plucked string shivers.

params.name: damping
params.description: How quickly a pluck rings down; higher stills the string sooner.

params.name: amplitude
params.description: How far a pluck throws a string, as a fraction of its pitch spacing.

params.name: pluck
params.description: The chance each hit plucks any given string.

params.name: thickness
params.description: How wide a string's lit core is, as a fraction of its spacing.

params.name: glow
params.description: How far the halo around each string reaches.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the course.
